---
id: handle-delete-link
title: "Delete a link"
description: "Soft-deletes a link belonging to the authenticated organization and removes its KV mapping so it stops redirecting"
sidebar_label: "Delete a link"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete a link"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/links/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Soft-deletes a link belonging to the authenticated organization and removes its KV mapping so it stops redirecting

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
